title: Course Management System — Full-Stack Spring Boot + Vue
summary: A full-stack course management system with a Spring Boot 2.6.7 / MyBatis / MySQL REST backend and a Vue.js frontend. The backend exposes REST endpoints on port 8080 for three user roles; the frontend communicates via Axios. In addition to the controller and page action hollows, this task now also includes student-facing MyBatis mapper annotations and the student route table entries that connect login, dashboard, question-bank, and resource-browser flows.
instructionPreview: This is a database course-design project (CourseDesignDBMS) — a course-management system built with Spring Boot 2.6.7, MyBatis, and MySQL. The system serves three user roles (students, teachers, and guests) and exposes a REST API on port 8080. A Vue.js frontend communicates with the backend via Axios HTTP requests. The database schema is already created and seeded; the Spring Boot application JAR is pre-built.
instruction:
This is a database course-design project (CourseDesignDBMS) — a course-management system built with Spring Boot 2.6.7, MyBatis, and MySQL. The system serves three user roles (students, teachers, and guests) and exposes a REST API on port 8080. A Vue.js frontend communicates with the backend via Axios HTTP requests. The database schema is already created and seeded; the Spring Boot application JAR is pre-built.

Your working directory is `/workspace`. The backend source is at `/workspace/CourseDesignDBMS/` and the frontend source is at `/workspace/myvue/`.

## Modules to Implement

The following modules need to be implemented or substantially built out:

- **MyBatis Mapper — Student Flows** (`CourseDesignDBMS/src/main/java/com/hnu/dbserver/mapper/DataBase.java`): The student-facing SQL bindings in the `DataBase` MyBatis interface have been hollowed. You must restore the annotations for student login, password updates, topic/leader selection, grade queries, report uploads, and the name/topic lookup helpers that support the student controller and upload flows. (~11 mapper methods to restore)

- **REST Controller — Handler** (`CourseDesignDBMS/src/main/java/com/hnu/dbserver/controller/Handler.java`): The main REST API controller providing all business endpoints for the course management system. All endpoint handler methods have been stubbed out with `throw new UnsupportedOperationException("TODO: implement")`. You must implement endpoints for student login, teacher login, password changes, topic selection, grade and progress management, question bank management, resource browsing, and data queries. Each method receives request parameters, interacts with the `DataBase` MyBatis mapper (injected as `db`), and returns a Map or JSONObject response. (~14 methods to implement)

- **REST Controller — UploadController** (`CourseDesignDBMS/src/main/java/com/hnu/dbserver/controller/UploadController.java`): Handles file upload operations for students submitting reports and teachers uploading learning materials. All methods have been stubbed. You must implement file saving logic and the two upload endpoints. (~3 methods to implement)

- **Vue Frontend — Student Routes** (`myvue/src/router/index.js`): The student-facing route table has been partially hollowed. You must restore the default redirect plus the route records for the student login page, student dashboard, question bank, and resource browser so the student flow can navigate across its main pages. (~5 route definitions/redirects to restore)

- **Vue Frontend — Login Components** (`myvue/src/components/student_denglu.vue`, `myvue/src/components/teacher_denglu.vue`): Login page components for students and teachers. The student component now has hollowed form validators, form-state initialization, a dashboard-routing helper, and its `save()` authentication flow; the teacher component still has a stubbed `save()` method for API authentication and dashboard routing. (~4 student-side flows plus 1 teacher method to implement)

- **Vue Frontend — Student Operations** (`myvue/src/components/student_caozuo.vue`): Student dashboard providing topic selection, report upload, password change, question-bank/resource navigation, and grade display functionality. The route-derived form state, validators, upload widget hooks, navigation helpers, create-time grade bootstrap, and the methods `loadGrade()`, `submituploadform()`, `newpass()`, and `submit()` are hollowed. (~10 methods/flows/helpers to implement)

- **Vue Frontend — Teacher Operations** (`myvue/src/components/teacher_caozuo.vue`, `myvue/src/components/teacher_caozuo2.vue`): Teacher dashboard pages for uploading questions, uploading materials, changing password, and managing student progress/grades. Multiple methods are stubbed including file upload handling, question submission, grade/progress setting dialogs, and data loading. (~8 methods to implement)

- **Vue Frontend — Admin Pages** (`myvue/src/components/home.vue`, `myvue/src/components/userhome.vue`): Person and user management pages with CRUD table operations. The `load()`, `save2()`, and `handleDelete()` methods are stubbed. (~6 methods to implement)

- **Vue Frontend — Question Bank View** (`myvue/src/components/tiku.vue`): Displays the question bank; the table-state initialization, `created()` bootstrap, and `loadQuestionBank()` flow for fetching and displaying question data are hollowed. (~3 small view/bootstrap flows to implement)

- **Vue Frontend — Resource Browser** (`myvue/src/components/ziliao.vue`): Displays downloadable learning materials; the table-state initialization, `created()` bootstrap, and `loadResources()` flow that fetches `/getResource` data are hollowed. (~3 small view/bootstrap flows to implement)

## Test-Coupled Signatures

The following REST endpoints are called directly by the test suite. You must implement them with the exact response format shown:

- `POST /stuLogin(sno: String, spwd: String) -> JSONObject` — Verifies student credentials; returns `{"code": 200, "msg": "登录成功", "account": sno, "题号": <topic_id>, "type": "学生"}` on success or `{"code": 404, "msg": "登录失败", "type": "学生"}` on failure.
- `GET/POST /teaLogin(tno: String, tpwd: String) -> Map` — Verifies teacher credentials; returns `{"code": 200, "msg": "登录成功", "type": "教师"}` on success or `{"code": 404, ...}` on failure.
- `GET/POST /stuUpdatePwd(sno: String, nspwd: String) -> Map` — Updates student password; returns `{"code": 200, "msg": "修改密码成功", "type": "学生"}` on success.
- `GET/POST /teaUpdatePwd(tno: String, tpass: String) -> Map` — Updates teacher password; returns `{"code": 200, "msg": "修改密码成功", "type": "教师"}` on success.
- `GET/POST /chooseQue(sno: String, qno: String, isLeader: boolean) -> Map` — Student topic selection with leader assignment logic.
- `GET/POST /setGrade(qno: String, gleader: String, grade: String) -> Map` — Teacher assigns grade; returns `{"msg": "成绩修改成功！"}` or `{"msg": "成绩修改失败！"}`.
- `GET/POST /setProgress(qno: String, gleader: String, progress: String) -> Map` — Teacher sets progress; returns `{"msg": "修改成功！"}` or `{"msg": "修改失败！"}`.
- `GET/POST /uploadQue(qname: String) -> Map` — Adds question to bank; returns `{"msg": "添加题目成功"}` on success.
- `GET/POST /seleQueName() -> Map` — Returns all questions from the question bank in `{"data": [...], "msg": "获取题库成功"}`.
- `GET/POST /seleQueCond(sno: String) -> Map` — Returns topic selection info for a student in `{"data": [...]}`.
- `GET/POST /seleGrade(sno: String) -> Map` — Returns grade data for a student in `{"data": {...}}`.
- `GET/POST /seleQue() -> Map` — Returns all student-topic selections for teacher view.
- `GET/POST /seleGData() -> Map` — Returns all project records (topic, leader, report, progress, grade).
- `GET /getResource() -> Map` — Returns learning materials list.

After implementing the Java endpoints, rebuild the application: `cd /workspace/CourseDesignDBMS && mvn package -DskipTests -q`

moduleDag.project: Course Management System — Full-Stack Spring Boot + Vue
moduleDag.description: A full-stack course management system with a Spring Boot 2.6.7 / MyBatis / MySQL REST backend and a Vue.js frontend. The backend exposes REST endpoints on port 8080 for three user roles; the frontend communicates via Axios. In addition to the controller and page action hollows, this task now also includes student-facing MyBatis mapper annotations and the student route table entries that connect login, dashboard, question-bank, and resource-browser flows.

nodes.label: MyBatis Mapper — Student Flows
nodes.description: Student-oriented methods in the DataBase MyBatis interface have had their annotations hollowed: student login, student password updates, topic-selection status checks, grade lookup, topic confirmation, leader-record insertion, student-name/topic lookups, and report-upload persistence all need their SQL bindings restored.

nodes.label: Vue Frontend — Admin Pages
nodes.description: Person management (home.vue) and user management (userhome.vue) admin pages, each with three stubbed methods: load() fetches a paginated table from the backend, save2() PUTs an edited row, and handleDelete() sends a DELETE request. These pages call pre-existing /api/person/ and /api/user/ endpoints that are not part of this task's patch.

nodes.label: Vue Frontend — Student Routes
nodes.description: Student-facing router configuration with a hollowed default redirect plus hollowed route records for the student login page, student dashboard, question-bank page, and resource-browser page.

nodes.label: REST Controller — Handler
nodes.description: Main business REST controller with 14 stubbed endpoints covering student/teacher authentication, password changes, topic selection with group-leader assignment logic, grade and progress management, question bank CRUD, and read queries for grades, topic status, and learning materials. The student endpoints depend on the restored student DataBase mapper bindings.

nodes.label: REST Controller — UploadController
nodes.description: File upload controller with three stubbed methods: a shared upload() helper that saves a multipart file to disk and returns its URL, a student report upload endpoint (/stuUpload) that records the file path against the student's topic, and a teacher material upload endpoint (/teaUpload) that inserts a resource record in the database.

nodes.label: Vue Frontend — Login Components
nodes.description: Student login page (student_denglu.vue) now has hollowed validators, hollowed form state, a hollowed dashboard-routing helper, and a hollowed save() authentication flow; teacher login (teacher_denglu.vue) still has its stubbed save() method. Both pages authenticate against the backend and route into their respective dashboards.

nodes.label: Vue Frontend — Question Bank View
nodes.description: Read-only question bank page whose tableData initialization, created() bootstrap, and loadQuestionBank() flow are hollowed; the page should fetch /seleQueName and render the available course design topics.

nodes.label: Vue Frontend — Resource Browser
nodes.description: Read-only learning-materials page whose tableData initialization, created() bootstrap, and loadResources() flow are hollowed; the page should fetch /getResource and render downloadable course materials.

nodes.label: Vue Frontend — Student Dashboard
nodes.description: Student operations page with hollowed template event wiring, hollowed validator helpers, hollowed route-derived form state, hollowed upload/navigation helper methods, a hollowed created() grade bootstrap, and hollowed action methods for grade loading, report upload, password change, and topic selection.

nodes.label: Vue Frontend — Teacher Dashboard
nodes.description: Two teacher operation pages: teacher_caozuo.vue implements material upload (POST /teaUpload), question submission (POST /uploadQue), and password change (POST /teaUpdatePwd); teacher_caozuo2.vue implements load() to fetch all project records via GET /seleGData, plus open1()/setProgress() and open2()/setGrade() dialog actions for updating student progress and grades.

edges.label: student-facing Handler endpoints call DataBase student login/password/selection/grade helper methods, so the mapper annotations must exist first
stuUpload persists the student report path through the DataBase student upload mapper method
student_denglu.vue routes into the student dashboard, so the student login/dashboard route records must be present
the question-bank page is reachable through the student-facing route table
the resource-browser page is reachable through the student-facing route table
student_caozuo.vue navigates across student_denglu, tiku, and ziliao, so those route entries should exist first
login components POST credentials to /stuLogin and /teaLogin, both implemented in backend_handler
student dashboard calls /stuUpdatePwd, /chooseQue, and /seleGrade, all implemented in backend_handler
teacher dashboard calls /teaUpdatePwd, /uploadQue, /setGrade, /setProgress, and /seleGData, all implemented in backend_handler
tiku.vue POSTs to /seleQueName which is implemented in backend_handler
ziliao.vue POSTs to /getResource which is implemented in backend_handler
student_caozuo.vue submits work reports via POST /stuUpload implemented in upload_controller
teacher_caozuo.vue uploads learning materials via POST /teaUpload implemented in upload_controller
student dashboard is navigated to only after successful login; the authenticated student number (sno) and current topic number (qno) are passed via Vue Router from the login component
teacher dashboard is navigated to only after successful login established by the login component
